red_lines: Military invasion or blockade by China
Diplomatic isolation cutting off all international relationships
core_narratives: Status quo maintenance across the strait

decision_history.event_description: Inauguration amid heightened cross-strait tensions and PLA military exercises
decision_history.decision_taken: Delivered measured inaugural speech emphasizing peace while asserting Taiwan's sovereignty as Republic of China
decision_history.outcome: China conducted military exercises, US reaffirmed support, regional tension managed

decision_history.event_description: Continued Chinese military pressure with regular incursions into Taiwan ADIZ
decision_history.decision_taken: Increased defense spending, deepened military cooperation with US and Japan, pursued asymmetric defense strategy
decision_history.outcome: Enhanced deterrence posture, strengthened US-Taiwan defense ties

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: DPP supporters, younger generation, southern Taiwan, Taiwanese identity voters

military_posture.force_disposition: asymmetric defense with focus on anti-invasion capability
